title: Overnight Shooting in West Charlotte Injures One
summary: One person was injured in a shooting near Freedom Drive around 2 a.m., according to Medic.
charlotte_impact: Highlights ongoing concerns about violent crime in certain areas of Charlotte and the need for community safety initiatives.

title: Three Hospitalized After Northeast Charlotte Crash
summary: A crash in northeast Charlotte early Saturday resulted in three people being hospitalized with serious injuries, Medic reports.
charlotte_impact: Addresses traffic safety and the potential for serious accidents on Charlotte's roadways.

title: Fire Danger Risks Prompt Cooler, Drier Weekend
summary: A fire weather warning is in effect for Saturday due to dry conditions.
charlotte_impact: Informs residents about potential fire hazards and encourages preventative measures during dry weather conditions.

title: Woman Fatally Shot at North Charlotte Apartment
summary: A woman was shot and killed through her front door late Thursday. Shell casings were found outside her apartment.
charlotte_impact: Raises serious concerns about safety and security within residential areas of Charlotte.

title: Trump Signs Order to Pay TSA, Easing Airport Delays
summary: President Trump signed an executive order to pay TSA workers, alleviating long airport wait times.
charlotte_impact: Addresses the impact of government actions on travel and airport operations.

title: Gunfire Strikes East Charlotte Restaurant, Video Shows Chaos
summary: Surveillance video captured chaotic moments as gunfire hit an east Charlotte restaurant, leaving patrons scared.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the impact of gun violence on local businesses and the community's sense of safety.

title: Kathie Dello: NC's First Female State Climatologist
summary: Kathie Dello served as North Carolina's first female state climatologist from 2019 to 2025.
charlotte_impact: Recognizes the achievements of women in science and environmental leadership within North Carolina.

title: Judge Considers Legality of CMPD Force During 2020 Protests
summary: A judge is reviewing whether CMPD used unlawful force during the 2020 protests, with plaintiffs arguing officers trapped and used force without cause.
charlotte_impact: Addresses accountability and transparency in law enforcement practices during public demonstrations.

title: Uptown Redevelopment: Apartments and Retail Near Stadium
summary: A major redevelopment project in Uptown will bring 448 apartments and new retail space near Bank of America Stadium.
charlotte_impact: Details urban development and its potential impact on housing and retail opportunities in Charlotte.

title: Charlotte Mom: Shelter Age Limits Leave Families Homeless
summary: A Charlotte mom highlights how shelter age limits leave families with teens without housing options, forcing some to live in cars.
charlotte_impact: Exposes gaps in social services and the challenges faced by families experiencing homelessness.

title: CMPD Officer Charged with Assault on a Female
summary: CMPD officer Ryan Clement has been charged with assault on a female and is on unpaid administrative leave.
charlotte_impact: Addresses issues of police misconduct and accountability within the Charlotte-Mecklenburg Police Department.

title: South Carolina Issues Statewide Burn Ban
summary: The South Carolina Forestry Commission has issued a statewide ban on outdoor burning, effective March 27.
charlotte_impact: Alerts residents to fire safety measures and restrictions in neighboring South Carolina.

title: Red Flag Warning: Increased Wildfire Risk in North Carolina
summary: A Red Flag Warning has been issued for North Carolina due to warm temperatures, low humidity, and strong winds, increasing wildfire risk.
charlotte_impact: Warns of heightened wildfire danger and encourages caution to prevent fires.

title: Chester County Shooting Suspects Indicted for 2022 Murder
summary: Two men have been indicted for murder in connection with the 2022 killing of Darius Minter in Chester County.
charlotte_impact: Reports on progress in the investigation and prosecution of a past violent crime.

title: Charlotte Knights Kick Off Season Against Durham Bulls
summary: The Charlotte Knights begin their season with a weekend series against the Durham Bulls, featuring fireworks and family events.
charlotte_impact: Promotes local sports and entertainment opportunities for the community.
